languages.text: "Трансформации настолько удивительные, что звучат почти... отрадно". {n}Манипулус даже не пытается скрыть печаль.{/n} "Жаль осознавать, что это с высокой степенью вероятности лишь иллюзия, смущающая наши умы".

"Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."
languages.original_text: "Трансформации настолько удивительные, что звучат почти... отрадно". {n}Манипулус даже не пытается скрыть печаль.{/n} "Жаль осознавать, что это с высокой степенью вероятности лишь иллюзия, смущающая наши умы".

traits.locale_text: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

"Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

"Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

"Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

languages.text: «Unas transformaciones tan maravillosas que su resonancia es casi... esperanzadora». {n}El manipulus no intenta ocultar su pesar.{/n} «Es una lástima darme cuenta de la elevada probabilidad de que esto solo sea una ilusión que busca confundir nuestras mentes».
languages.original_text: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

traits.locale_text: «Unas transformaciones tan maravillosas que su resonancia es casi... esperanzadora». {n}El manipulus no intenta ocultar su pesar.{/n} «Es una lástima darme cuenta de la elevada probabilidad de que esto solo sea una ilusión que busca confundir nuestras mentes».

languages.text: “如此奇妙的转变，几乎让人觉得……振奋。”{n}操纵者丝毫没有掩饰自己的悲伤。{/n}“可惜的是，这很可能只是迷惑心智的幻觉。”
languages.original_text: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

traits.locale_text: “如此奇妙的转变，几乎让人觉得……振奋。”{n}操纵者丝毫没有掩饰自己的悲伤。{/n}“可惜的是，这很可能只是迷惑心智的幻觉。”

languages.text: "Transformationen, so wunderbar, dass sie beinahe ... herzerweichend sind." {n}Der Manipulus gibt sich keine Mühe, sein Bedauern zu verbergen.{/n} "Es ist ein Jammer, zu erkennen, dass es sich hierbei mit hoher Wahrscheinlichkeit nur um eine Illusion handelt, die unseren Verstand verwirrt."
languages.original_text: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

traits.locale_text: "Transformationen, so wunderbar, dass sie beinahe ... herzerweichend sind." {n}Der Manipulus gibt sich keine Mühe, sein Bedauern zu verbergen.{/n} "Es ist ein Jammer, zu erkennen, dass es sich hierbei mit hoher Wahrscheinlichkeit nur um eine Illusion handelt, die unseren Verstand verwirrt."

languages.text: « Des transformations si merveilleuses qu'elles paraissent presque... encourageantes, {n}songe le manipulus sans faire le moindre effort pour dissimuler sa peine.{/n} Quel dommage de constater que tout cela n'est très probablement qu'une illusion qui sème la confusion dans nos esprits. »
languages.original_text: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

traits.locale_text: « Des transformations si merveilleuses qu'elles paraissent presque... encourageantes, {n}songe le manipulus sans faire le moindre effort pour dissimuler sa peine.{/n} Quel dommage de constater que tout cela n'est très probablement qu'une illusion qui sème la confusion dans nos esprits. »

languages.text: "O kadar harika dönüşümler ki neredeyse... Cesaret verici olarak yankılanıyorlar." {n}Manipülus, kederini gizlemeye çalışmıyor.{/n} "Yüksek bir ihtimalle bunun sadece zihnimizi karıştıran bir illüzyon olduğunu fark etmek çok üzücü."
languages.original_text: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

traits.locale_text: "O kadar harika dönüşümler ki neredeyse... Cesaret verici olarak yankılanıyorlar." {n}Manipülus, kederini gizlemeye çalışmıyor.{/n} "Yüksek bir ihtimalle bunun sadece zihnimizi karıştıran bir illüzyon olduğunu fark etmek çok üzücü."

languages.text: 「まるで…希望に満ちたような、素晴らしい変容だ」{n}マニピュラスは悲しみを隠そうともしない.{/n}「この幻覚が、私たちの心を惑わす可能性が高いことを知るのは、残念だ」
languages.original_text: "Transformations so marvellous that they resonate as almost... heartening." {n}The Manipulus makes no effort to conceal his sorrow.{/n} "It is a pity to realise that, with a high degree of probability, this is merely an illusion, confusing our minds."

traits.locale_text: 「まるで…希望に満ちたような、素晴らしい変容だ」{n}マニピュラスは悲しみを隠そうともしない.{/n}「この幻覚が、私たちの心を惑わす可能性が高いことを知るのは、残念だ」
